displayList.title: displayList
displayList.description:
Numbered list of test drives to show to customer. 
Display exactly as returned. Do not modify.

idMap.title: idMap
idMap.description:
Split on || then ## to get:
Part 1 = number
Part 2 = testDriveId (starts with a0)
Part 3 = dealerId (starts with 001)
Part 4 = vehicleId
Store silently. Never show to user.

message.title: message
message.description:
Display this to user when totalCount = 0.
Contains friendly explanation of why no 
test drives were found based on context passed.

totalCount.title: totalCount
totalCount.description:
Total number of test drives returned.
If 0 — display message field to user and do not proceed.
If greater than 0 — display displayList to user.
